---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest a new feature or enhancement
title: "[FEAT] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## Problem / motivation
What problem are you trying to solve? Why is the current behavior insufficient?

## Proposed solution
Describe what you'd like to see — API, CLI flag, doc section, etc.

## Alternatives considered
Other approaches you've thought about.

## Scope
- [ ] Core RL (env / data_loader / inference)
- [ ] Training pipeline (train.py / SB3 callbacks / wandb)
- [ ] ONNX export / runtime
- [ ] Documentation
- [ ] Tests / CI
- [ ] Other: _______

## Additional context
Screenshots, papers, related issues, etc.
